docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF EDWARD DELAO IS PRESENT WITH WITNESS BERT PELAEZ. DEFENDANT DAVID MANN IS PRESENT WITH WITNESSES: PATRICK COLLINS AND PRIMO PITINO (TENANT). NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLVIA L. HUSING; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
REMARK:RETURN MAIL BY POST OFFICE OCT-27-2023 ORDER OF DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION MAIL TO DEFENDANT(ENVOLOPE MARKED:RETURN TO SENDER NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED UNABLE TO FORWARD)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,575.00 FILED BY DELAO, EDWARD AS TO DEFENDANT MANN, DAVID ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-30-2022 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
